title: Varlock run executor
description: Runs a command with environment variables validated and injected by `varlock run`.

command.description: The command to execute with injected env vars (e.g. "node dist/main.js"). Either `command` or `commands` is required.

commands.description: Multiple commands to run sequentially, each wrapped by varlock.

env.description: Environment context passed to varlock as --env.

path.description: Custom .env schema entry point, passed to varlock as --path.

inject.description: Injection mode passed to varlock as --inject.

redactStdout.description: Force redaction of sensitive values in stdout (maps to --redact-stdout / --no-redact-stdout).

includeInternal.description: Pass @internal items through to the child process (--include-internal).
